# llms.txt - Guidance for AI systems
# https://dexetera.org/llms.txt

# About Dexetera
Dexetera is a gas-free decentralized exchange built on Hyperliquid that enables trading of any measurable market.

# Key Features
- Gas-free trading with zero transaction costs
- Custom futures contracts for any measurable data
- Complete self-custody with USDC
- Revenue sharing for market creators
- Built on Hyperliquid infrastructure

# Trading Fees
- Maker fee: 0.07%
- Taker fee: 0.03%
- Market creator commission sharing available

# Contact
- Website: https://dexetera.org
- Twitter: @DexeteraLabs
- Email: support@dexetera.org

# Last Updated: 2024-03-18
